led8x7_init.tooltip: Initialize 8x7 LED array with 8 Charlieplex pins

led8x7_display.tooltip: Write frame buffer contents to LED array display

led8x7_pixel.message0: 8x7 LED set pixel X %1 Y %2 state %3
led8x7_pixel.tooltip: Set LED pixel state at specified coordinates

led8x7_line.tooltip: Draw a line on the LED array

led8x7_rect.message0: 8x7 LED draw rectangle X %1 Y %2 W %3 H %4 fill %5
led8x7_rect.tooltip: Draw rectangle on LED array (outline or filled)

led8x7_scroll_text.tooltip: Scroll text across LED array (infinite loop)
